name: Put amount
description: The monetary amount that the option gives the right to sell.
format: Conforms to 2024 Rules specifications; 'all 9s' is an allowable value.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for a foreign exchange option (other than a digital option).
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: For the conditionally required Action types, if Asset class is CURR and Contract type is OPTN and UPI Product is not a digital option, a value is required for at least one of Call amount and Put amount.
Where the value of either Notional amount—Leg 1 or Notional amount—Leg 2 is not known at the time of reporting and is reported as ‘all 9s’, the corresponding Put amount is also reported as ‘all 9s’.
Put amount is updated to the amount subsequently determined, using a MODI-TRAD report.
